description_long: This is a classic red fire hydrant with a cylindrical body and a domed top, accented by a green flange near the upper section. The hydrant features two large side outlets capped with round metal covers, each secured by a short metal chain. A central front-facing outlet is also present, with a similar cap and chain. The hydrant is bolted to a wide, octagonal base, which provides stability and is typical for installation on urban sidewalks or curbs. The surface is painted red with visible wear and some weathering, and the green flange is fastened with metallic bolts. Subtle manufacturer markings are visible on the body, adding to its authenticity and detail.
description: A red, weathered fire hydrant with a domed top, green flange, and three capped outlets secured by chains. The hydrant is bolted to a wide base and features visible manufacturer markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central outlet, two side outlets, and all three chains clearly attached to the caps.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the side outlet and chain, with the domed top and green flange visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hydrant, both side outlets, and the manufacturer markings on the body.
description_view_3: Left-side view focusing on the left outlet and chain, with the domed top and green flange in profile.
